raw_comment:
I notice that sports organizations are more accepting of player of colors.
I wonder why baseball has the lowest percent of players of color?
Impact: I love seeing that people of color color have an opportunity to have careers in sports. I just wish that they had more Diverse people to work with beyond their team for a more comfortable environment. I feel that the lack of diversity beyond the sports teams result in more insensitive behaviors toward players of color.
Headline: Diversity Beyond The Court and Field
